subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-03-06 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: Formerly I was so accustomed that I slept in Acca in the same small room with 13 other souls, but now if there sleeps another person in my room I lie awake all night.
subcodes.subjects: @disregarding bodily comfort, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
